name: Statite 1000
comment: Statite 1000 is a powerful, fully-featured 1000W LED profile moving head offering exceptional output with vibrant color mixing, crisp projection quality, and a dynamic range of effects. With 50,000 total lumens of output, Statite 1000 features an exceptionally wide zoom range that maintains a crisp, flat field of focus throughout with low-noise operation. An advanced 4-blade framing shutter system provides full blackout and 180º rotation capability with macros for complete projection control, along with an animation wheel, motorized iris, 2 gobo wheels, and dual prisms for stunning surface and aerial effects. Satite's signature color mixing palette offers variable CMY + CTO color mixing, a 5-slot dichroic color wheel including UV with 70+ CRI for vibrant color output with unsacrificed brightness. The pure power and dynamic functionality of Statite 1000 deliver unmatched creative flexibility at an exceptional value.

capabilities.comment: Iris Macro 1  Slow Open/Fast Close S > F - Macro
Iris Macro 2  Fast Open/Slow Close S > F - Macro
Iris Macro 3  Open /Close Pulse S > F - Macro
Reset Zoom  Focus  Prism  Frost - Reset
Reset Animation Wheel  Iris  Framing Shutters - Reset
Fan - Quiet Mode - Low Speed - Custom
